CheckTitle: Security group restricts Elasticsearch and Kibana access from the internet
Description: Checks that Elasticsearch and Kibana TCP ports 9200, 9300, and 5601 are not exposed to unrestricted IPv4 (`0.0.0.0/0`) or IPv6 (`::/0`) sources.
Risk: Public search and dashboard endpoints can expose indexed data, administrative functions, and vulnerable services.

Code.Other: Inspect inbound rules in the ECS console. Locate effective Accept rules from `0.0.0.0/0` or `::/0` using TCP or ALL whose actual port range contains Elasticsearch ports `9200` or `9300`, or Kibana port `5601`. Restrict the source or range, or revoke the exact rule by SecurityGroupRuleId. Revocation using protocol/range/source must exactly match the existing rule.

Recommendation.Text: Do not expose TCP ports 9200, 9300, or 5601 to `0.0.0.0/0` or `::/0`.
